title: Nasdaq Halts MaxsMaking Inc.
content:
NEW YORK, Dec.  02, 2025  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market® (Nasdaq: NDAQ)announced that trading is halted in MaxsMaking Inc. (Nasdaq: MAMK) for additional information requested from the company. Previously, the Securities and Exchange Commission effected a trading suspension in MAMK from 04:00:00 on November 17, 2025 to 23:59:00 on December 1, 2025. The last sale price of the company’s shares was $13.00.

More information about the SEC’s order can be found at https://www.sec.gov/files/litigation/suspensions/2025/34-104180.pdf.

Trading will remain halted until MaxsMaking Inc. has fully satisfied Nasdaq’s request for additional information.

For news and additional information about the company, please contact the company directly or check under the company’s symbol using InfoQuotesSM on the Nasdaq® Web site.

For more information about The Nasdaq Stock Market, visit the Nasdaq Web site at http://www.nasdaq.com.

Nasdaq Contact:

Nasdaq MarketWatch
nasdaqmarketwatch@nasdaq.com

NDAQO

title: MaxsMaking affirms full cooperation after SEC suspends trading over suspected manipulation
content:
[The heart of the Financial district in New York: Wall Street]

MaxsMaking (MAMK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MAMK]) on Monday said [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20323064-maxsmaking-inc-addresses-sec-trading-suspension-and-affirms-full-cooperation-with-regulators] the SEC’s 10-day trading suspension—set to expire tonight—was not related to the accuracy of information about the company.

It added that it has no indication that the trading in question involved shares held by current officers, directors, or employees.

"The trading suspension did not relate to questions regarding the accuracy and adequacy of information in the marketplace about the company. Moreover, the company has no information to suggest that the trading involved any shares held by current MaxsMaking officers, directors, or employees," MaxsMaking (MAMK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MAMK]) added.

Furthermore, the company, which manufactures customized consumer goods, added that it has no information at this time to suggest that the recent trading activity was conducted by persons known to current management.

MaxsMaking (MAMK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MAMK]) has pledged to and is cooperating fully with the SEC's inquiry into the trading of the company's securities, and has issued its public filings, including its published financial statements.

 	* Financial information for MaxsMaking Inc. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MAMK/income-statement]
